meanings.definition: encouragement in the form of cheers from spectators
examples: it's all over but the shouting

meanings.definition: show approval or good wishes by shouting
cause (somebody) to feel happier or more cheerful
examples: She tried to cheer up the disappointed child when he failed to win the spelling bee

meanings.definition: spur on or encourage especially by cheers and shouts
examples: The crowd cheered the demonstrating strikers
